validations.name: outcome_a_deterministic

validations.name: no_mixed_authority

validations.name: downstream_51_2_paths_explicit
validations.evidence: input_authority_matrix.md records 4 canonical paths with SHA-256 for each. Prohibited substitutions explicitly listed. Mixed-authority prevention rule defined.

validations.name: no_content_modified

validations.name: no_fail_closed_triggers_fired
